summary: CLI proxy tools must treat exit code 1 as valid output, not failure.
evidence: zephyr review exits with rc=1 when findings exist — this is documented CLI behavior
treating rc=1 as error caused every non-empty review to return an error response
recommended_action: Accept rc 0 and 1 as success for CLI tools that use rc=1 to signal findings. Only rc>=2 or FileNotFoundError signals a real failure.

summary: uv run does not inherit .env automatically — load_dotenv must be called at import time.
evidence: server restarted cleanly but MQ_MCP_ALLOWED_PATHS was empty because .env was not loaded
fixed by adding load_dotenv(Path(__file__).parent / '.env', override=False) at the top of server.py
recommended_action: Always call load_dotenv() at module import time in FastMCP servers started via uv run. Use override=False to preserve shell-set vars.

summary: When a CLI supports --json or --format json, always expose that as a separate mq-mcp tool returning dict.
evidence: repo_signal_report, repo_signal_suggest, repo_signal_positioning added as JSON-returning tools
text-output variants are useful for display; JSON variants are what mq-agent can machine-read and chain
recommended_action: For each CLI proxy tool, check if a structured JSON flag exists. If yes, add a second tool that returns dict — named with the same base but no suffix change needed.
